reviews.review_description: This is a lovely app, currently in alpha, so I’m sure there’s lots more to come (hence only 4 stars). There are 3 sections: color therapy (PLEASE be aware it’s not a coloring app), breathing, and sound therapy. If you like relaxation/meditation apps, give this a try. They’re off to a beautiful start with this app, and I’m looking forward to watching it grow.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for your review! Now that we're out of alpha, we'd love for you to try it again and let us know what you think!
